description: Enumerate every primer candidate of admissible length at each start position in a region and evaluate each (returned in generation order, not sorted).

region_start.description: 0-based inclusive start of the search region.

region_end.description: Exclusive end of the search region (region_start < region_end <= template.Length).

forward.description: True for forward-strand candidates, false for reverse complement.

candidates.description: Evaluated PrimerCandidate records in generation order.

errors.message: Template cannot be null or empty
Region end must not exceed the template length
Region start must be strictly less than region end

examples.name: Forward candidates over [0,60) of the standard 258 bp template
Reverse candidate is reverse complement of the template substring
